content.text: Tantri Trailers (Pvt) Ltd – Mr. Menaka Nuwan and the award record

Tantri Trailers (Pvt) Ltd – Mr. Menaka Nuwan is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of The Best Human Resources Manager of The Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Tantri Trailers (Pvt) Ltd – Mr. Menaka Nuwan, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

The GBE archive lists Menaka Nuwan with Tantri Trailers for Human Resources Manager of the Year. Official and EDB sources support Tantri Trailers as a trailer and metal-structure manufacturer/exporter. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
